name: @easywasm/gl
description: Web host interface exposing GLFW 3.5 to WebAssembly modules compiled with wasi-sdk

scripts.example:mac: clang $(pkg-config --cflags --libs glfw3) -isysroot $(xcrun --show-sdk-path) -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo src/example.c -o example
